description_long: This is a folding pocket knife featuring a single-edged, drop-point blade made of metal with a matte finish. The handle is ergonomically contoured, constructed from a combination of wood and metal, and includes a visible metal liner and a pocket clip on one side. The wood handle has a reddish-brown hue with visible grain, while the metal components are a muted silver-gray. The knife is compact, with a pivot mechanism near the blade's base and a thumb stud for one-handed opening. The overall design is practical and robust, suitable for everyday carry or utility use. There are no visible decorative engravings or inlays, giving it a functional and straightforward appearance.
description: A compact folding pocket knife with a drop-point metal blade and a contoured wood-and-metal handle, featuring a pocket clip and thumb stud. The design is practical and unadorned, emphasizing utility.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blade partially open, the wood and metal handle, and the pocket clip.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the thin blade profile and the layered construction of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the full length of the blade and the smooth wood handle without the clip.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the handle's thickness and the alignment of the blade within the handle.
attribute_handle_design: contoured wood with metal liner, ergonomic grip, integrated pocket clip
